TypeSignature.Value: public class XmlValidatingReader : System.Xml.XmlReader, System.Xml.IXmlLineInfo, System.Xml.IXmlNamespaceResolver
.class public auto ansi beforefieldinit XmlValidatingReader extends System.Xml.XmlReader implements class System.Xml.IXmlLineInfo, class System.Xml.IXmlNamespaceResolver
Public Class XmlValidatingReader Inherits XmlReader Implements IXmlLineInfo, IXmlNamespaceResolver
type XmlValidatingReader = class inherit XmlReader interface IXmlLineInfo interface IXmlNamespaceResolver
public ref class XmlValidatingReader : System::Xml::XmlReader, System::Xml::IXmlLineInfo, System::Xml::IXmlNamespaceResolver

Attribute.AttributeName: [System.Obsolete("XmlValidatingReader has been deprecated. Use XmlReader created by XmlReader.Create() method using appropriate XmlReaderSettings instead.")]
[<System.Obsolete("XmlValidatingReader has been deprecated. Use XmlReader created by XmlReader.Create() method using appropriate XmlReaderSettings instead.")>]

Docs.summary: Represents a reader that provides document type definition (DTD), XML-Data Reduced (XDR) schema, and XML Schema definition language (XSD) validation.
Initializes a new instance of the class.

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor(class System.Xml.XmlReader reader) cil managed

Docs.param: The to read from while validating. The current implementation supports only .
Docs.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class that validates the content returned from the given .
Docs.exception: The reader specified is not an .

MemberSignature.Value: public XmlValidatingReader (System.IO.Stream xmlFragment, System.Xml.XmlNodeType fragType, System.Xml.XmlParserContext context);

.method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor(class System.IO.Stream xmlFragment, valuetype System.Xml.XmlNodeType fragType, class System.Xml.XmlParserContext context) cil managed
Public Sub New (xmlFragment As Stream, fragType As XmlNodeType, context As XmlParserContext)
new System.Xml.XmlValidatingReader : System.IO.Stream * System.Xml.XmlNodeType * System.Xml.XmlParserContext -> System.Xml.XmlValidatingReader
public: XmlValidatingReader(System::IO::Stream ^ xmlFragment, System::Xml::XmlNodeType fragType, System::Xml::XmlParserContext ^ context);

Docs.param: The stream containing the XML fragment to parse.
The of the XML fragment. This determines what the fragment can contain (see table below).
The in which the XML fragment is to be parsed. This includes the to use, encoding, namespace scope, current , and scope.
Docs.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified values.
Docs.exception: is not one of the node types listed in the table below.

MemberSignature.Value: public XmlValidatingReader (string xmlFragment, System.Xml.XmlNodeType fragType, System.Xml.XmlParserContext context);
.method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor(string xmlFragment, valuetype System.Xml.XmlNodeType fragType, class System.Xml.XmlParserContext context) cil managed
Public Sub New (xmlFragment As String, fragType As XmlNodeType, context As XmlParserContext)
new System.Xml.XmlValidatingReader : string * System.Xml.XmlNodeType * System.Xml.XmlParserContext -> System.Xml.XmlValidatingReader
public: XmlValidatingReader(System::String ^ xmlFragment, System::Xml::XmlNodeType fragType, System::Xml::XmlParserContext ^ context);

Docs.param: The string containing the XML fragment to parse.
The of the XML fragment. This also determines what the fragment string can contain (see table below).
The in which the XML fragment is to be parsed. This includes the to use, encoding, namespace scope, current xml:lang, and xml:space scope.
Docs.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified values.
Docs.exception: is not one of the node types listed in the table below.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Overrides ReadOnly Property AttributeCount As Integer
public: virtual property int AttributeCount { int get(); };

Docs.summary: Gets the number of attributes on the current node.
Docs.value: The number of attributes on the current node. This number includes default attributes.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Overrides ReadOnly Property BaseURI As String
public: virtual property System::String ^ BaseURI { System::String ^ get(); };

Docs.summary: Gets the base URI of the current node.
Docs.value: The base URI of the current node.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Overrides ReadOnly Property CanReadBinaryContent As Boolean
public: virtual property bool CanReadBinaryContent { bool get(); };

Docs.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the implements the binary content read methods.
Docs.value: if the binary content read methods are implemented; otherwise . The class returns .

MemberSignature.Value: Public Overrides ReadOnly Property CanResolveEntity As Boolean
public: virtual property bool CanResolveEntity { bool get(); };

Docs.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this reader can parse and resolve entities.
Docs.value: if the reader can parse and resolve entities; otherwise, . always returns .

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig virtual instance void Close() cil managed

Docs.summary: Changes the to Closed.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Overrides ReadOnly Property Depth As Integer
public: virtual property int Depth { int get(); };

Docs.summary: Gets the depth of the current node in the XML document.
Docs.value: The depth of the current node in the XML document.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property Encoding As Encoding
public: property System::Text::Encoding ^ Encoding { System::Text::Encoding ^ get(); };

Docs.summary: Gets the encoding attribute for the document.
Docs.value: The encoding value. If no encoding attribute exists, and there is not byte-order mark, this defaults to UTF-8.

MemberSignature.Value: member this.EntityHandling : System.Xml.EntityHandling with get, set
public: property System::Xml::EntityHandling EntityHandling { System::Xml::EntityHandling get(); void set(System::Xml::EntityHandling value); };

Docs.summary: Gets or sets a value that specifies how the reader handles entities.
Docs.value: One of the values. If no is specified, it defaults to EntityHandling.ExpandEntities.
Docs.exception: Invalid value was specified.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Overrides ReadOnly Property EOF As Boolean
public: virtual property bool EOF { bool get(); };

Docs.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the reader is positioned at the end of the stream.
Docs.value: if the reader is positioned at the end of the stream; otherwise, .

Docs.summary: Gets the value of an attribute.

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig virtual instance string GetAttribute(int32 i) cil managed
Public Overrides Function GetAttribute (i As Integer) As String

Docs.param: The index of the attribute. The index is zero-based. (The first attribute has index 0.)
Docs.summary: Gets the value of the attribute with the specified index.
Docs.returns: The value of the specified attribute.
Docs.exception: The parameter is less than 0 or greater than or equal to .

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig virtual instance string GetAttribute(string name) cil managed
Public Overrides Function GetAttribute (name As String) As String

Docs.param: The qualified name of the attribute.
Docs.summary: Gets the value of the attribute with the specified name.
Docs.returns: The value of the specified attribute. If the attribute is not found, is returned.

MemberSignature.Value: public override string? GetAttribute (string localName, string? namespaceURI);
.method public hidebysig virtual instance string GetAttribute(string localName, string namespaceURI) cil managed
Public Overrides Function GetAttribute (localName As String, namespaceURI As String) As String
public: override System::String ^ GetAttribute(System::String ^ localName, System::String ^ namespaceURI);

Docs.param: The local name of the attribute.
The namespace URI of the attribute.
Docs.summary: Gets the value of the attribute with the specified local name and namespace Uniform Resource Identifier (URI).
Docs.returns: The value of the specified attribute. If the attribute is not found, is returned. This method does not move the reader.

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig newslot virtual instance bool HasLineInfo() cil managed
abstract member HasLineInfo : unit -> bool override this.HasLineInfo : unit -> bool

Docs.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the class can return line information.
Docs.returns: if the class can return line information; otherwise, .

MemberSignature.Value: Public Overrides ReadOnly Property HasValue As Boolean
public: virtual property bool HasValue { bool get(); };

Docs.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the current node can have a other than String.Empty.
Docs.value: if the node on which the reader is currently positioned can have a ; otherwise, .

MemberSignature.Value: Public Overrides ReadOnly Property IsDefault As Boolean
public: virtual property bool IsDefault { bool get(); };

Docs.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the current node is an attribute that was generated from the default value defined in the document type definition (DTD) or schema.
Docs.value: if the current node is an attribute whose value was generated from the default value defined in the DTD or schema; if the attribute value was explicitly set.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Overrides ReadOnly Property IsEmptyElement As Boolean
public: virtual property bool IsEmptyElement { bool get(); };

Docs.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the current node is an empty element (for example, <MyElement/>).
Docs.value: if the current node is an element ( equals ) that ends with />; otherwise, .

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property LineNumber As Integer
public: property int LineNumber { int get(); };

Docs.summary: Gets the current line number.
Docs.value: The current line number. The starting value for this property is 1.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property LinePosition As Integer
public: property int LinePosition { int get(); };

Docs.summary: Gets the current line position.
Docs.value: The current line position. The starting value for this property is 1.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Overrides ReadOnly Property LocalName As String
public: virtual property System::String ^ LocalName { System::String ^ get(); };

Docs.summary: Gets the local name of the current node.
Docs.value:
The name of the current node with the prefix removed. For example, is for the element <bk:book>.
For node types that do not have a name (like , , and so on), this property returns String.Empty.

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig virtual instance string LookupNamespace(string prefix) cil managed
Public Overrides Function LookupNamespace (prefix As String) As String

Docs.param: The prefix whose namespace Uniform Resource Identifier (URI) you want to resolve. To match the default namespace, pass an empty string.
Docs.summary: Resolves a namespace prefix in the current element's scope.
Docs.returns: The namespace URI to which the prefix maps or if no matching prefix is found.

Docs.summary: Moves to the specified attribute.

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig virtual instance void MoveToAttribute(int32 i) cil managed
Public Overrides Sub MoveToAttribute (i As Integer)

Docs.param: The index of the attribute.
Docs.summary: Moves to the attribute with the specified index.
Docs.exception: The parameter is less than 0 or greater than or equal to .

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig virtual instance bool MoveToAttribute(string name) cil managed
Public Overrides Function MoveToAttribute (name As String) As Boolean

Docs.param: The qualified name of the attribute.
Docs.summary: Moves to the attribute with the specified name.
Docs.returns: if the attribute is found; otherwise, . If , the position of the reader does not change.

MemberSignature.Value: public override bool MoveToAttribute (string localName, string? namespaceURI);
.method public hidebysig virtual instance bool MoveToAttribute(string localName, string namespaceURI) cil managed
Public Overrides Function MoveToAttribute (localName As String, namespaceURI As String) As Boolean
public: override bool MoveToAttribute(System::String ^ localName, System::String ^ namespaceURI);

Docs.param: The local name of the attribute.
The namespace URI of the attribute.
Docs.summary: Moves to the attribute with the specified local name and namespace Uniform Resource Identifier (URI).
Docs.returns: if the attribute is found; otherwise, . If , the position of the reader does not change.

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig virtual instance bool MoveToElement() cil managed
Public Overrides Function MoveToElement () As Boolean

Docs.summary: Moves to the element that contains the current attribute node.
Docs.returns: if the reader is positioned on an attribute (the reader moves to the element that owns the attribute); if the reader is not positioned on an attribute (the position of the reader does not change).

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig virtual instance bool MoveToFirstAttribute() cil managed
Public Overrides Function MoveToFirstAttribute () As Boolean

Docs.summary: Moves to the first attribute.
Docs.returns: if an attribute exists (the reader moves to the first attribute); otherwise, (the position of the reader does not change).

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig virtual instance bool MoveToNextAttribute() cil managed
Public Overrides Function MoveToNextAttribute () As Boolean

Docs.summary: Moves to the next attribute.
Docs.returns: if there is a next attribute; if there are no more attributes.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Overrides ReadOnly Property Name As String
public: virtual property System::String ^ Name { System::String ^ get(); };

Docs.summary: Gets the qualified name of the current node.
Docs.value:
The qualified name of the current node. For example, is for the element <bk:book>.
The name returned is dependent on the of the node. The following node types return the listed values. All other node types return an empty string.
Node Type
Name
The name of the attribute.
The document type name.
The tag name.
The name of the entity referenced.
The target of the processing instruction.
The literal string .

MemberSignature.Value: member this.Namespaces : bool with get, set
public: property bool Namespaces { bool get(); void set(bool value); };

Docs.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to do namespace support.
Docs.value: to do namespace support; otherwise, . The default is .

MemberSignature.Value: Public Overrides ReadOnly Property NamespaceURI As String
public: virtual property System::String ^ NamespaceURI { System::String ^ get(); };

Docs.summary: Gets the namespace Uniform Resource Identifier (URI) (as defined in the World Wide Web Consortium (W3C) Namespace specification) of the node on which the reader is positioned.
Docs.value: The namespace URI of the current node; otherwise an empty string.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Overrides ReadOnly Property NameTable As XmlNameTable
public: virtual property System::Xml::XmlNameTable ^ NameTable { System::Xml::XmlNameTable ^ get(); };

Docs.summary: Gets the associated with this implementation.
Docs.value: that enables you to get the atomized version of a string within the node.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Overrides ReadOnly Property NodeType As XmlNodeType
public: virtual property System::Xml::XmlNodeType NodeType { System::Xml::XmlNodeType get(); };

Docs.summary: Gets the type of the current node.
Docs.value: One of the values representing the type of the current node.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Overrides ReadOnly Property Prefix As String
public: virtual property System::String ^ Prefix { System::String ^ get(); };

Docs.summary: Gets the namespace prefix associated with the current node.
Docs.value: The namespace prefix associated with the current node.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Overrides ReadOnly Property QuoteChar As Char
public: virtual property char QuoteChar { char get(); };

Docs.summary: Gets the quotation mark character used to enclose the value of an attribute node.
Docs.value: The quotation mark character (" or ') used to enclose the value of an attribute node.

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig virtual instance bool Read() cil managed
Public Overrides Function Read () As Boolean

Docs.summary: Reads the next node from the stream.
Docs.returns: if the next node was read successfully; if there are no more nodes to read.

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig virtual instance bool ReadAttributeValue() cil managed
Public Overrides Function ReadAttributeValue () As Boolean

Docs.summary: Parses the attribute value into one or more , , or nodes.
Docs.returns:
if there are nodes to return.
if the reader is not positioned on an attribute node when the initial call is made or if all the attribute values have been read.
An empty attribute, such as, misc="", returns with a single node with a value of String.Empty.

MemberSignature.Value: public override int ReadContentAsBase64 (byte[] buffer, int index, int count);
.method public hidebysig virtual instance int32 ReadContentAsBase64(unsigned int8[] buffer, int32 index, int32 count) cil managed
Public Overrides Function ReadContentAsBase64 (buffer As Byte(), index As Integer, count As Integer) As Integer
override this.ReadContentAsBase64 : byte[] * int * int -> int
public: override int ReadContentAsBase64(cli::array <System::Byte> ^ buffer, int index, int count);

Docs.param: The buffer into which to copy the resulting text. This value cannot be .
The offset into the buffer where to start copying the result.
The maximum number of bytes to copy into the buffer. The actual number of bytes copied is returned from this method.
Docs.summary: Reads the content and returns the Base64 decoded binary bytes.
Docs.returns: The number of bytes written to the buffer.
Docs.exception: The value is .
is not supported on the current node.
The index into the buffer or index + count is larger than the allocated buffer size.

MemberSignature.Value: public override int ReadContentAsBinHex (byte[] buffer, int index, int count);
.method public hidebysig virtual instance int32 ReadContentAsBinHex(unsigned int8[] buffer, int32 index, int32 count) cil managed
Public Overrides Function ReadContentAsBinHex (buffer As Byte(), index As Integer, count As Integer) As Integer
override this.ReadContentAsBinHex : byte[] * int * int -> int
public: override int ReadContentAsBinHex(cli::array <System::Byte> ^ buffer, int index, int count);

Docs.param: The buffer into which to copy the resulting text. This value cannot be .
The offset into the buffer where to start copying the result.
The maximum number of bytes to copy into the buffer. The actual number of bytes copied is returned from this method.
Docs.summary: Reads the content and returns the BinHex decoded binary bytes.
Docs.returns: The number of bytes written to the buffer.
Docs.exception: The value is .
is not supported on the current node.
The index into the buffer or index + count is larger than the allocated buffer size.
The implementation does not support this method.

MemberSignature.Value: public override int ReadElementContentAsBase64 (byte[] buffer, int index, int count);
.method public hidebysig virtual instance int32 ReadElementContentAsBase64(unsigned int8[] buffer, int32 index, int32 count) cil managed
Public Overrides Function ReadElementContentAsBase64 (buffer As Byte(), index As Integer, count As Integer) As Integer
override this.ReadElementContentAsBase64 : byte[] * int * int -> int
public: override int ReadElementContentAsBase64(cli::array <System::Byte> ^ buffer, int index, int count);

Docs.param: The buffer into which to copy the resulting text. This value cannot be .
The offset into the buffer where to start copying the result.
The maximum number of bytes to copy into the buffer. The actual number of bytes copied is returned from this method.
Docs.summary: Reads the element and decodes the Base64 content.
Docs.returns: The number of bytes written to the buffer.
Docs.exception: The value is .
The current node is not an element node.
The index into the buffer or index + count is larger than the allocated buffer size.
The implementation does not support this method.
The element contains mixed-content.
The content cannot be converted to the requested type.

MemberSignature.Value: public override int ReadElementContentAsBinHex (byte[] buffer, int index, int count);
.method public hidebysig virtual instance int32 ReadElementContentAsBinHex(unsigned int8[] buffer, int32 index, int32 count) cil managed
Public Overrides Function ReadElementContentAsBinHex (buffer As Byte(), index As Integer, count As Integer) As Integer
override this.ReadElementContentAsBinHex : byte[] * int * int -> int
public: override int ReadElementContentAsBinHex(cli::array <System::Byte> ^ buffer, int index, int count);

Docs.param: The buffer into which to copy the resulting text. This value cannot be .
The offset into the buffer where to start copying the result.
The maximum number of bytes to copy into the buffer. The actual number of bytes copied is returned from this method.
Docs.summary: Reads the element and decodes the BinHex content.
Docs.returns: The number of bytes written to the buffer.
Docs.exception: The value is .
The current node is not an element node.
The index into the buffer or index + count is larger than the allocated buffer size.
The implementation does not support this method.
The element contains mixed-content.
The content cannot be converted to the requested type.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property Reader As XmlReader
public: property System::Xml::XmlReader ^ Reader { System::Xml::XmlReader ^ get(); };

Docs.summary: Gets the used to construct this .
Docs.value: The specified in the constructor.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Overrides ReadOnly Property ReadState As ReadState
public: virtual property System::Xml::ReadState ReadState { System::Xml::ReadState get(); };

Docs.summary: Gets the state of the reader.
Docs.value: One of the values.

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig virtual instance string ReadString() cil managed
Public Overrides Function ReadString () As String

Docs.summary: Reads the contents of an element or text node as a string.
Docs.returns: The contents of the element or text node. This can be an empty string if the reader is positioned on something other than an element or text node, or if there is no more text content to return in the current context.

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig instance object ReadTypedValue() cil managed

Docs.summary: Gets the common language runtime type for the specified XML Schema definition language (XSD) type.
Docs.returns: The common language runtime type for the specified XML Schema type.

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig virtual instance void ResolveEntity() cil managed

Docs.summary: Resolves the entity reference for nodes.
Docs.exception: The reader is not positioned on an node.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property Schemas As XmlSchemaCollection
public: property System::Xml::Schema::XmlSchemaCollection ^ Schemas { System::Xml::Schema::XmlSchemaCollection ^ get(); };

Docs.summary: Gets a to use for validation.
Docs.value: The to use for validation.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property SchemaType As Object
public: property System::Object ^ SchemaType { System::Object ^ get(); };

Docs.summary: Gets a schema type object.
Docs.value: , , or depending whether the node value is a built in XML Schema definition language (XSD) type or a user defined simpleType or complexType; if the current node has no schema type.

MemberSignature.Value: .method hidebysig newslot virtual instance class System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary`2<string, string> System.Xml.IXmlNamespaceResolver.GetNamespacesInScope(valuetype System.Xml.XmlNamespaceScope scope) cil managed
Function GetNamespacesInScope (scope As XmlNamespaceScope) As IDictionary(Of String, String) Implements IXmlNamespaceResolver.GetNamespacesInScope

abstract member System.Xml.IXmlNamespaceResolver.GetNamespacesInScope : System.Xml.XmlNamespaceScope -> System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary<string, string> override this.System.Xml.IXmlNamespaceResolver.GetNamespacesInScope : System.Xml.XmlNamespaceScope -> System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary<string, string>

Docs.param: An object that identifies the scope of the reader.
Docs.summary: For a description of this member, see .
Docs.returns: An object that identifies the namespaces in scope.

remarks.format: ## Remarks This member is an explicit interface member implementation. It can be used only when the <xref:System.Xml.XmlValidatingReader> instance is cast to an <xref:System.Xml.IXmlNamespaceResolver> interface.

MemberSignature.Value: .method hidebysig newslot virtual instance string System.Xml.IXmlNamespaceResolver.LookupNamespace(string prefix) cil managed
Function LookupNamespace (prefix As String) As String Implements IXmlNamespaceResolver.LookupNamespace
abstract member System.Xml.IXmlNamespaceResolver.LookupNamespace : string -> string override this.System.Xml.IXmlNamespaceResolver.LookupNamespace : string -> string

Docs.param: The namespace prefix.
Docs.summary: For a description of this member, see .
Docs.returns: A string value that contains the namespace Uri that is associated with the prefix.

remarks.format: ## Remarks This member is an explicit interface member implementation. It can be used only when the <xref:System.Xml.XmlValidatingReader> instance is cast to an <xref:System.Xml.IXmlNamespaceResolver> interface.

MemberSignature.Value: .method hidebysig newslot virtual instance string System.Xml.IXmlNamespaceResolver.LookupPrefix(string namespaceName) cil managed
Function LookupPrefix (namespaceName As String) As String Implements IXmlNamespaceResolver.LookupPrefix
abstract member System.Xml.IXmlNamespaceResolver.LookupPrefix : string -> string override this.System.Xml.IXmlNamespaceResolver.LookupPrefix : string -> string

Docs.param: The namespace that is associated with the prefix.
Docs.summary: For a description of this member, see .
Docs.returns: A string value that contains the namespace prefix that is associated with the .

remarks.format: ## Remarks This member is an explicit interface member implementation. It can be used only when the <xref:System.Xml.XmlValidatingReader> instance is cast to an <xref:System.Xml.IXmlNamespaceResolver> interface.

Docs.summary: Sets an event handler for receiving information about document type definition (DTD), XML-Data Reduced (XDR) schema, and XML Schema definition language (XSD) schema validation errors.

MemberSignature.Value: member this.ValidationType : System.Xml.ValidationType with get, set
public: property System::Xml::ValidationType ValidationType { System::Xml::ValidationType get(); void set(System::Xml::ValidationType value); };

Docs.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating the type of validation to perform.
Docs.value: One of the values. If this property is not set, it defaults to ValidationType.Auto.
Docs.exception: Setting the property after a Read has been called.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Overrides ReadOnly Property Value As String
public: virtual property System::String ^ Value { System::String ^ get(); };

Docs.summary: Gets the text value of the current node.
Docs.value:
The value returned depends on the of the node. The following table lists node types that have a value to return. All other node types return String.Empty.
Node Type
Value
The value of the attribute.
The content of the CDATA section.
The content of the comment.
The internal subset.
The entire content, excluding the target.
The white space between markup in a mixed content model.
The content of the text node.
The white space between markup.
The content of the declaration.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Overrides ReadOnly Property XmlLang As String
public: virtual property System::String ^ XmlLang { System::String ^ get(); };

Docs.summary: Gets the current scope.
Docs.value: The current scope.

MemberSignature.Value: public: property System::Xml::XmlResolver ^ XmlResolver { void set(System::Xml::XmlResolver ^ value); };

Docs.summary: Sets the used for resolving external document type definition (DTD) and schema location references. The is also used to handle any import or include elements found in XML Schema definition language (XSD) schemas.
Docs.value: The to use. If set to , external resources are not resolved.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Overrides ReadOnly Property XmlSpace As XmlSpace
public: virtual property System::Xml::XmlSpace XmlSpace { System::Xml::XmlSpace get(); };

Docs.summary: Gets the current scope.
Docs.value: One of the values. If no scope exists, this property defaults to .
